title: MISTAKE: please fix this: On top of that, the Telegram fallback (the one off‑Wi‑Fi path that does normally work) is currently...
content:
What went wrong: please fix this: On top of that, the Telegram fallback (the one off‑Wi‑Fi path that does normally work) is currently down too:
gateway_state.json → telegram: "fatal" (telegram_polling_conflict)

 Want it to work on cellular without Wi‑Fi/USB
Action needed: investigate and prevent recurrence
